utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Now check each: (1) destination – fully specified with city, country, region ✅; (2) travel_dates – has start and end dates ✅; (3) transportation – includes airline, class, price, total cost, currency, baggage info, but missing departure and arrival airports (marked unspecified). Since the format requires flight details with costs, and airport info is part of details, it's only partially specified ❌; (4) accommodation – fully specified with name, type, rating, costs ✅; (5) activities – lists types and description, but missing costs (the format says 'selected activities with costs') ❌; (6) additional_services – included with restaurant details and costs ✅; (7) total_budget – fully specified with total cost, currency, and breakdown ✅. Therefore, 5 items (destination, travel_dates, accommodation, additional_services, total_budget) are fully specified out of 7 total.
